function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md by sending outbound email via outbox. Used outbox/README.MD invariant: write next numbered file from seq.json and then bump seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: accounts/acct_009.json identifies Aperture AI Labs as the software account with an open separate security review for new data flow; contacts/cont_009.json provides canonical recipient email. outbox/seq.json pre-bump id 84505 was used for outbox/84505.json, then seq advanced to 84506 per outbox/README.MD.
